text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Look at this, Trainer! What do you think's in this
box?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Could it be candy? Could it be cake? Oh, but
what if it's a little bird? It could even be some
kind of secret message!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: So many possibilities exist up until the moment we open it. ☆ That's what makes it so marvelous! ★

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Thinking about it is so much fun! ☆ What's the
most marvelous thing it could be?
